name: Cornbread
recipeInstructions:
1. Pre-heat the oven to 350°F.
2. In a large bowl stir together the flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt.
3. In another bowl mix together the milk, butter, bacon grease, and egg.
4. Add the dry ingredients to the wet and mix until all lumps are dissolved.
5. Pour the mixture into an 8 x 8-inch baking pan.
6. Bake until golden brown, about 50 to 60 minutes.
